name: openclaw-team-ops-console
description: OpenClaw Team Ops Console - OpenClaw Multi-Agent Control

scripts.dev: corepack pnpm --filter @openclaw-team-ops/shared build && concurrently -k -n SIDECAR,API,WEB -c cyan,green,magenta "corepack pnpm --filter @openclaw-team-ops/sidecar dev" "corepack pnpm --filter @openclaw-team-ops/overlay-api dev" "corepack pnpm --filter @openclaw-team-ops/overlay-web dev"
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @openclaw-team-ops/shared build && corepack pnpm -r typecheck
